{{CargoRelic
|name=No Longer Human
|class_id=22180
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-18
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Jan 1, 2018 AD, Ozama wrote his own pain into No Longer Human.<br>No Longer Human is a semi-autobiographical work by Japanese author Ozama. The book consists of a preface, an afterword, and three chapters that chronicle the life of the protagonist from childhood to middle age. To escape reality, the protagonist slowly descends into tragic self-destruction. The author's deep pain can be felt from his stagnant prose. After completing this work, Ozama, who attempted suicide several times, finally ended his life by drowning.
[Famous quote from the novel]
I am very sorry for being a man.
|fame=54
|art=44
|fth=42
|civ=73
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
|ss2=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +8<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
|ss3=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
|ss4=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +14<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
|ss5=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +18<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210
|ss7=Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 7 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +18<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 210/210<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hamster skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Hamster skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT +4.5%
}}
